title: Add builder golden merge gate (Golden Test 22)
problem: ticket-023 validates improvement ticket structure for builder agents, but Golden Test 22 requires builder-implemented changes to pass the full golden fixture suite before merge without regressions in ingestion, extraction, linking, scoring, export, reports, or ticket generation.
evidence: docs/agents/00_GOLDEN_TESTS.md Test 22: builder changes must pass golden fixtures before merge.
acceptance_criteria: Golden Test 22 verifies required golden coverage areas exist and remain runnable.
Meta-test documents merge gate expectation: pytest tests/golden before merge.
non_goals: Do not implement CI pipeline wiring in this ticket.
Do not add public write routes.
Do not implement safety audit merge gating (Golden Test 23).
